name: Marketing
description: Learn how to understand customers, communicate value, and grow a product or business

concepts.name: What Is Marketing?
concepts.description: Marketing as understanding what people need and communicating how your product solves that need.

concepts.name: Target Audience & Segmentation
concepts.description: Identifying who your product is for. Demographics, psychographics, and behavioral segmentation.

concepts.name: Value Proposition
concepts.description: Articulating why someone should choose your product over alternatives. Features vs benefits.

concepts.name: Positioning & Messaging
concepts.description: How your product is perceived relative to competitors. Crafting a positioning statement.

concepts.name: The Marketing Funnel
concepts.description: Awareness, consideration, conversion, retention. How customers move from stranger to loyal buyer.

concepts.name: Content Marketing
concepts.description: Creating valuable content that attracts and educates your audience. Blog posts, videos, newsletters.

concepts.name: SEO Basics
concepts.description: How search engines rank content. Keywords, on-page optimization, and creating content that gets found.

concepts.name: Paid Advertising
concepts.description: Google Ads, social media ads. CPC, CPM, targeting, and measuring return on ad spend.

concepts.name: Email Marketing
concepts.description: Building a list, writing effective emails, automation sequences, and measuring open/click rates.

concepts.name: Marketing Analytics
concepts.description: Measuring what works. Key metrics (CAC, LTV, conversion rate), attribution, and A/B testing.
